basic_details.job_title: NCBS Facility Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Centre for Biological Sciences (NCBS) Facility Assistant (MGEF) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 July 2026 on the official website of NCBS. A total of 1 Facility Assistant (MGEF) vacancy has been announced through the NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years (as on 01-01-2026) Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in any biological sciences any discipline /BE / B.Tech / M.Pharma from a recognized University/Institute with a minimum of 50% of marks in aggregate. Excellent organization and recordkeeping are essential.
qualification.details: Masters in any biological sciences any discipline /BE / B.Tech / M.Pharma from a recognized University/Institute with a minimum of 50% of marks in aggregate. Excellent organization and recordkeeping are essential.

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay based on qualification and experience, subject to institutional guidelines.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCBS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.national_centre_for_biological_sciences_: Masters in any biological sciences any discipline /BE / B.Tech / M.Pharma from a recognized University/Institute with a minimum of 50% of marks in aggregate. Excellent organization and recordkeeping are essential.

content_sections.heading: NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NCBS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Masters in any biological sciences any discipline /BE / B.Tech / M.Pharma from a recognized University/Institute with a minimum of 50% of marks in aggregate. Excellent organization and recordkeeping are essential.

content_sections.heading: NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years (as on 01-01-2026) Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India norms.

content_sections.heading: NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Consolidated pay based on qualification and experience, subject to institutional guidelines.

content_sections.heading: NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCBS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) position is 31st July 2026. It is advisable to complete the application process well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in any biological sciences discipline, or a BE/B.Tech/M.Pharma from a recognized university with at least 50% marks. Excellent organizational and recordkeeping skills are also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) post is 35 years as of January 1, 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the available information.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) position in the National Centre for Biological Sciences.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) post will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this? Contractual or Permanent?
faq.answer: The job for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the National Centre for Biological Sciences located?
faq.answer: The National Centre for Biological Sciences (NCBS) is located in Bangalore, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary structure for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Facility Assistant (MGEF) position will be a consolidated pay based on the candidate's qualification and experience, adhering to institutional guidelines.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the NCBS Facility Assistant (MGEF) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of NCBS or the provided application link before the last date, 31st July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate and required documents are uploaded.
